summary: Frontend-only testing of WUG radial topology (/wug-topology) and UniFi devices (/unifi-devices) pages. All 12 specified test cases PASSED. Both pages render correctly with DEMO/MOCK data since LAN-only controllers are unreachable from preview environment.

wug_page.site nodes count (8): PASS — novi, remus, mt-pleasant, ovid, middlebury, canton, constantine, canton-whs
wug_page.wug-alert-banner shows '1 DEVICE DOWN': PASS — text: '1 DEVICE DOWN — CHECK AFFECTED LOCATIONS'

unifi_page.5 site cards visible (not skeleton): PASS — novi, remus, mt-pleasant, canton, constantine

critical_code_review_comments: WUG page: wug-error-banner shows '404 Not Found' for WUG API endpoint — expected in preview (LAN-only), MOCK data renders correctly
UniFi page: 8s axios timeout working correctly — falls back to DEMO_SITES after timeout
context_for_next_testing_agent: All WUG and UniFi frontend tests pass. WUG radial topology renders with 8 sites, 30 device nodes, hub-and-spoke layout correct. Remus shows offline state with 1 DEVICE DOWN alert. UniFi falls back to DEMO_SITES (5 sites, 21 devices) after 8s timeout with 1 offline device (U6-Lite A). Both pages use MOCK/DEMO data as LAN controllers are unreachable.
